steps.script: () => { const dots=[...document.querySelectorAll('[aria-label*="Go to slide" i]')]; if(!dots.length) return {found:false}; let sec=dots[0].closest('section,.shopify-section,[class*=section]')||dots[0].parentElement; const h=sec.querySelector('h1,h2,h3'); const ctrls=[...sec.querySelectorAll('button,a')].map(b=>(b.getAttribute('aria-label')||'').trim()).filter(Boolean); const arrows=ctrls.filter(l=>/prev|next|previous/i.test(l)); return {found:true, dotCount:dots.length, sectionHeading:(h?h.textContent.trim():null), arrowCount:arrows.length, arrowLabels:arrows.slice(0,6), allCtrls:ctrls.slice(0,12)}; }

async () => { const ns = ["bianca-cloud-rose-lifestyle-1.jpg", "bianca-cloud-rose-lifestyle-2.jpg", "martina-red-product-page-3x2.jpg", "martinacafe-2.jpg", "CelesteLoungeSets-Minuit.jpg", "CelesteLoungeSets-Minuit4_46a47ed6-56ae-4b33-9d23-ad973ee6ee2e.jpg", "martina-midnight-vine.jpg", "MAY-FINAL-website-home-bianca-blue-wine-bar_2edf0c77-429a-43a5-b3a6-3bf9f095ffc3.jpg", "founder_landscape_graded.jpg", "slow-wardrobe-img-01.jpg", "clairo_0142_shopify_final2.jpg", "Tassia_Purple.jpg", "StellaNavy_6fde0796-2d0c-4a9f-92c6-144941c8945b.jpg", "Black_Blossom_Scrunchie_0.5x.jpg"]; const out=[]; for (const n of ns){ const u='https://meandlia.com/cdn/shop/files/'+n+'?width=4000'; const r=await new Promise(res=>{const im=new Image(); im.onload=()=>res({n,w:im.naturalWidth,h:im.naturalHeight}); im.onerror=()=>res({n,w:0,h:0,err:true}); im.src=u;}); out.push(r);} return out; }
